name: contractor-dash
description: Generalized contractor web UI SPA. One codebase, deployed per contractor via Vite env + wrangler Pages project. Forked pattern from ailedger/dashboard 2026-04-21.

scripts.deploy:pasha: npm run build:pasha && wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name pasha-dash
scripts.deploy:staging-pasha: npm run build:staging-pasha && wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name staging-pasha-dash
scripts.deploy:jake: npm run build:jake && wrangler pages deploy ./dist --project-name jake-dash
